message:
fix: Mirror source path structure in .metal0/bin to avoid conflicts

Before: tests/cpython/test_bool.py and tests/unit/test_bool.py
        would both output to .metal0/bin/test_bool.so -> CONFLICT

After:  tests/cpython/test_bool.py -> .metal0/bin/tests/cpython/test_bool.so
        tests/unit/test_bool.py -> .metal0/bin/tests/unit/test_bool.so

Parent directories auto-created as needed.
